## Runtime.Session.EditingSession.saveAsNewVersion() method

Saves as a new version of the original recipe. Requires that the collection is mutable.

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveAsNewVersion(options: ISaveVersionOptions): Result<ISaveResult>;
```
